description:
# Open question

`bl new` (create) walkthrough end-to-end.

Focus: plugin-assigned ball ID.

- Pre-invoke gets `command.ball_id: null`.
- Plugin (e.g. jira) can return `field_overrides.id: "PROJ-1234"`.
- balls applies overrides between plugin calls so a later plugin sees the assigned id.
- After pre-chain, balls finalizes the id (using id_scheme default if no plugin claimed it).
- File is written: `tasks/<final-id>.md`.
- Commit references the final id in the message k:v block.

Edge cases:
- Two plugins both return an id → conflict policy from §3.
- Plugin returns invalid id (collides with existing ball, or non-string-safe) → abort.
- No plugin claims id, no default scheme configured → error.
- Plugin assigns id but its post-invoke fails → rollback freed the id?

Spec the deterministic sequence and write the failure-mode list.
title: Topic: bl new walkthrough (plugin-assigned id)
